SQLLite.SQL: SELECT V.VARY_SEQ AS "VarySeq" , V.JUDG_SEQ AS "JudgSeq" , V.APPLICATION_DATE AS "ApplicationDate" , V.REQUESTER AS "Requester" , V.OFFER_AMOUNT AS "OfferAmount" , V.OFFER_PERIOD AS "OfferPeriod" , V.FIRST_PAYMENT_DATE AS "FirstPaymentDate" , V.PLAINTIFF_RESPONSE AS "PlaintiffResponse" , V.RESULT AS "Result" , V.RESULT_DATE AS "ResultDate" , V.DETERMINATION_AMOUNT AS "DeterminationAmount" , V.DETERMINATION_PERIOD AS "DeterminationPeriod" , V.OBJECTION AS "Objection" , V.OBJECTOR AS "Objector" , V.RESPONSE_DATE AS "ResponseDate" , V.HEARING_REQD AS "HearingReqd" , V.OBJECTION_DATE AS "ObjectionDate" , V.OFFER_AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "OfferAmountCurrency" , V.DETERMINATION_AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "DeterminationAmountCurrency" FROM VARIATIONS V WHERE V.VARY_SEQ = ${param.varySeq}
